**Parent:** [Does the causal theory of knowledge accommodate memory-based beliefs?](does-the-causal-theory-of-knowledge-accommodate-memory-based-beliefs-antithesis-32201760-2b1d-4c13-b7aa-21e7bcd0e568.md)

## Content

**A person knows a proposition if and only if they believe it**, **A person knows a proposition if and only if the proposition is true**, **A person knows a proposition if their belief is generated by a method that reliably leads to true beliefs**
